task_snapshots.title: [DECOMPOSE] 334d — Mission Control Observability Dashboard
task_snapshots.description:
A large task needs to be decomposed into 3-5 smaller, atomic subtasks.

## Original large task (id=5c08ace74a2c)
**Title:** 334d — Mission Control Observability Dashboard
**Role:** frontend  **Priority:** 1 (critical)  **Scope:** large
**Description:**
# 334d — Mission Control Observability Dashboard
**Role:** frontend  **Priority:** 1 (critical)  **Scope:** large

## Problem
5 sources: "I need a Mission Control for my local AI agents." Terminal logs unmanageable with 5+ agents.

## Design
Web dashboard: agent grid with status/progress/cost cards, task Gantt timeline, live per-agent logs, file lock map, merge queue, cost burn chart, alert panel.


<!-- source: 334d-mission-control-dashboard.md -->

## Your job
1. Read the task description carefully
2. Identify 3-5 specific, atomic subtasks (each completable in one agent session, < 30 min)
3. Each subtask should target specific files and have clear completion criteria
4. Create each subtask via the task server:
```bash
curl -s -X POST http://127.0.0.1:8052/tasks -H 'Content-Type: application/json' \
  -d '{"title": "...", "description": "... [subtask of 5c08ace74a2c]", "role": "frontend  **Priority:** 1 (critical)  **Scope:** large", "priority": 1, "scope": "small", "complexity": "medium"}'
```
5. After creating all subtasks, exit.

IMPORTANT: Each subtask description MUST include '[subtask of 5c08ace74a2c]' so it can be tracked back to the original task.
